info.title: HomeZ API
info.description:
HomeZ backend HTTP API.

## Phone auth (OTP + JWT)

**Login** — `POST /auth/login` with `phone_number` only: sends a **6-digit OTP** (10-minute expiry). If the phone is new, user is auto-created in unverified state. Response returns **only** `id` and `phone_number`.

**Resend OTP** — `POST /auth/resend-otp` with `phone_number`: reissues OTP for an existing user.

**Verify** — `POST /auth/verify` with `phone_number` and `otp`: message **Verified.** and a **JWT**. Payload includes `is_onboarding_completed`, `onboarding_step`, and full `user` for routing: if `is_onboarding_completed` is `false`, open onboarding; otherwise go to home.

**Get User** — `GET /auth/user` with `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>`: returns current user profile and onboarding flags for app boot routing.

**Onboarding** — `POST /auth/onboarding` with `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>`. **1** — `name`, `gender`. **2** — structured service location saved as the user’s first **`addresses`** row (`line1`, `area`, `city`, `pincode`, `latitude`, `longitude`, optional `label`; same rules as `POST /addresses`). If the user already has 3 saved addresses, step 2 only marks onboarding complete. Then `is_onboarding_completed` is `true`.

**Discounts** — `GET /discounts` and `GET /discounts/code/{code}` require the same Bearer JWT.

**Services** — `GET /services` and `GET /services/{id}` require `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>`. Query **`slot_type`**: `instant` (default), `scheduled`, or `all`. With `include_slots=true` on the list, `slots` is a filtered array; each slot includes its `slot_type`.

**Addresses** — `GET/POST /addresses`, `GET/PATCH/DELETE /addresses/{id}` require JWT. **Max 3 saved addresses** per user; first address is default unless you set `is_default`.

**Bookings** — `GET/POST /bookings`, `GET /bookings/{id}`, `POST /bookings/{id}/coupon`, `PATCH /bookings/{id}/status`, `POST /bookings/{id}/rating` require JWT. Create with `service_id`, `slot_id`, `address_id` (address must belong to the user; slot must belong to the service). **Status** on the booking may be `CREATED`, `ACCEPTED`, `REJECTED`, `ASSIGNING_STAFF`, `STAFF_EN_ROUTE`, `ARRIVED`, `COMPLETED`, or `CANCELLED`. **Users** may only use `PATCH /bookings/{id}/status` to **cancel** (`status: CANCELLED`) when the booking is not already terminal. Coupon apply only in `CREATED` and only once. Rating only when `COMPLETED` and not yet rated.

Indian numbers: you may send `phone_number` with or without `+91`; `+91` is stripped before storage.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: OTP-based login, resend, verify, and profile fetch (JWT)

tags.name: Onboarding
tags.description: Profile and address steps after phone verification (Bearer JWT)

tags.name: Services
tags.description: Service catalog and duration/pricing slots (Bearer JWT from /auth/verify)

tags.name: Addresses
tags.description: User saved addresses for checkout (Bearer JWT); max 3 per user

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Service bookings, coupons, lifecycle status, and ratings (Bearer JWT)

post.description: Single entrypoint for OTP auth. Sends OTP and auto-creates an unverified user if this number is new. Use verify for JWT.
Resends OTP for an existing user phone number. In development mode OTP is static `123456`; in production a real OTP is sent.
Verify OTP after login/resend flow. Message is **Verified.** Includes `is_onboarding_completed`, `onboarding_step`, and `user` so the client can open onboarding (step 1 or 2) or home.

400.description: Invalid or expired OTP, or validation error

get.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>`. Returns full user profile with onboarding flags.

post.description: **Step 1:** name + gender. **Step 2:** structured fields (`line1`, `area`, `city`, `pincode`, map coords, optional `label`) — creates a row in **`addresses`** if the user has fewer than 3; otherwise only completes onboarding. Requires verified user JWT.

step2.summary: Step 2 — structured address (saved to addresses table)

200.description: Step saved; returns updated user profile

409.description: Wrong step order or onboarding already finished

get.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>`. Only `is_active: true`, `is_deleted: false`, unexpired discounts. If `usage_limit_total` is set, rows where `usage_count` has reached that cap are omitted. If `usage_limit_total` is null, unlimited until expiry. Increment `usage_count` when a booking applies the code.

get.summary: Look up a discount by code
get.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>`. Code is matched case-insensitively (stored uppercase). Returns 404 if unknown, 400 if expired or sold out.

400.description: Expired, inactive, or usage limit reached

get.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>`. Optional `include_slots=true` to embed a **`slots` array** filtered by `slot_type` (default **instant**).

parameters.name: include_slots
parameters.description: When true, include `slots` for each service.

parameters.name: slot_type
parameters.description: Which slot rows to return when `include_slots` is true. `all` returns both instant and scheduled tiers.

get.description: Requires `Authorization: Bearer <JWT>`. Returns a **`slots` array** filtered by `slot_type` (default **instant**): duration, price, slash price.
Default address first, then oldest first. Bearer JWT required.

post.description: Maximum **3** addresses per user. Returns 409 if limit reached. Indian **pincode** must be 6 digits.

patch.description: Partial update. Setting `is_default: true` clears default on other addresses.

delete.description: If the default is removed, the oldest remaining address becomes default.

get.description: Newest first. Each item includes nested `service`, `slot`, and `address` summaries.

post.description: Snapshots slot price as `service_charge` and adds `platform_fee` (env `PLATFORM_FEE_INR`, default 20). Initial status is `CREATED`.
Only when status is `CREATED` and no coupon applied yet. Updates `discount_amount` and `total_amount`.

422.description: Wrong booking state or invalid discount

patch.description: Customers may only set `status` to `CANCELLED`. Fails if the booking is already `REJECTED`, `COMPLETED`, or `CANCELLED`, or if cancellation is not allowed from the current state.

post.description: Only when status is `COMPLETED` and `rating` is not already set. One submission per booking.

bearerAuth.description: Paste the JWT string only (Swagger adds the Bearer prefix). Get it from POST /auth/verify → data.token. Then use Authorize at the top of this page.

phoneWithPlus91.description: You may include +91; it is removed before storage so it matches the national form.

phoneNational.description: Send the mobile number without country code; same stored value as the +91 example above.

phone_number.description: Indian mobile: with or without +91; +91 is stripped before storage.

OtpSentUser.description: Minimal payload after login/resend OTP (OTP phase only)

is_onboarding_completed.description: If false, show onboarding; use onboarding_step for which screen.

onboarding_step.description: 1 = name & gender; 2 = address (until is_onboarding_completed is true).

OnboardingStep2.description: When the user has **fewer than 3** saved addresses, include `line1`, `area`, `city`, `pincode`, `latitude`, `longitude` (and optional `label`). If they already have **3** addresses, send only `{ "step": 2 }` to finish onboarding.

token.description: JWT — send as Authorization: Bearer <token> on protected routes

flow.description: registration = first-time verify; login = returning user sign-in.

is_onboarding_completed.description: Duplicate of user.is_onboarding_completed for quick routing after verify.

onboarding_step.description: Which onboarding screen to show when is_onboarding_completed is false.

PublicDiscount.description: percentage and/or amount may be set; both null would be invalid in practice.

slots.description: Present when list uses `include_slots=true` or on GET by id; filtered by `slot_type` (default instant).

payment_method.description: When set: UPI, CARD, or WALLET

scheduled_at.description: Optional ISO datetime for scheduled slots

status.description: Must be CANCELLED (only action allowed for the authenticated customer)
